evals.prompt: 我要测一下用户登录功能，帮我新建一个测试变更。PRD 在这里：https://wiki.example.com/login-prd
evals.expected_output: 创建 testspec/changes/user-login/ 目录结构（含 specs/ 和 artifacts/），生成 proposal.md 并关联 PRD 链接，末尾包含协作确认清单和上下文元数据。
assertions: Creates testspec/changes/<name>/ directory with specs/ and artifacts/ subdirectories
Generates proposal.md with the PRD link referenced
Includes collaboration checkpoint section with unchecked items
Seeds context metadata at the end of proposal.md with source_skill and material_quality
Suggests next step: testspec-analysis or testspec-points

evals.prompt: 有个新需求要测，release 2.0 的支付模块重构，需求文档在项目根目录的 docs/payment-refactor.md
evals.expected_output: 创建 testspec/changes/release-2.0-payment-refactor/ 目录，读取本地需求文档内容写入 proposal.md，评估材料质量。
assertions: Normalizes change name to kebab-case (e.g. release-2.0-payment-refactor or similar)
Reads the local requirement document at docs/payment-refactor.md
Writes proposal.md with content extracted from the requirement document
Assesses material_quality in context metadata based on document completeness
Does not skip ahead to analysis or points generation

evals.prompt: 帮我准备测试，功能是：用户可以通过手机号注册账号
evals.expected_output: 创建变更目录和 proposal.md，标注信息不足（仅一句话描述），material_quality 为 low，建议补充详细需求。
assertions: Creates the change directory structure successfully
Marks material_quality as low in context metadata due to minimal input
Proposal.md notes that information is insufficient and suggests supplementing
Does not fabricate detailed requirements beyond what the user provided
Includes collaboration checkpoint with all items unchecked
